title: Mind Games
editorialSummary: Classic philosophical thought experiments sorted by the branch of philosophy they belong to: ethics (trolley problem, violinist, drowning child, experience machine), epistemology (evil demon, brain in a vat, Gettier case, Molyneux), metaphysics (ship of Theseus, teleporter, fission, Chinese room), and political philosophy (veil of ignorance, state of nature, utility monster, libertarian objection). Each is a named thought experiment with one canonical home.

meta.gptRationale: Thought experiments are abstract and often known only by philosophy students, so both recognition and categorization are difficult here.
